response.justification: Strong, long-tenured individual contributor with genuine developer-tooling depth (test frameworks like Trial and Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup, IDE work at National Instruments, MCP code generators) and clear engineering productivity instincts. However, this is a Level II people-management role, and the resume shows no evidence of meeting the minimum requirement of 2 years in people management or formal technical leadership of a team. There is also limited mobile-platform depth (some iOS/Apple TV) and no demonstrated experience with roadmap planning or organizational change. The technical foundation fits the focus area, but the leadership gap is disqualifying for a manager hire without further screening.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure experience (test runners, CI/CD, dev-ops)
15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev, teaching workshops)
concerns: No evidence of people management or team-leadership experience (a stated minimum)
Limited mobile-platform and large-scale build-system ecosystem depth
No demonstrated roadmap planning or organizational-change leadership
